hero.name: Imagine Design Studio
hero.headline: Architecture That Shapes Tomorrow
hero.sidebarQuote: Imagine Design Studio transforms ideas into refined homes, workplaces, hospitality spaces, and urban environments.

about.title: We design spaces with clarity, craft, and purpose.
about.body: Imagine Design Studio is a contemporary architecture and interior design studio working across homes, workplaces, hospitality, and urban environments. We connect concept, material, detail, and delivery into spaces that feel resolved and enduring.

overview.title: Architecture, interiors, and spatial stories.
overview.description: A curated showcase of residential, commercial, hospitality, and urban design work shaped by proportion, material intelligence, and careful execution.

heroShowcase.title: SPATIAL SHOWCASE
heroShowcase.description: Signature architecture, interior, hospitality, and urban design concepts from the studio.

videoEditing.title: SPATIAL FILMS & DESIGN SEQUENCES
videoEditing.description: Cinematic walkthroughs and project narratives that explain light, material, movement, and experience.

softwareSystems.title: DRAWINGS, MODELS & DELIVERY SYSTEMS
softwareSystems.description: Coordinated drawing sets, material schedules, documentation, and build-ready design packages.

seoAnalytics.title: PROJECT MANAGEMENT & ANALYTICS
seoAnalytics.description: Data-driven construction delivery and resource optimization.

strategicConsulting.title: URBAN DESIGN & STRATEGIC CONSULTING
strategicConsulting.description: Frameworks for districts, adaptive reuse, mixed-use environments, and long-term spatial value.

contentWriting.title: CONCEPT NOTES, BRIEFS & SPECIFICATIONS
contentWriting.description: Clear design writing for client briefs, concept statements, project stories, and technical specifications.

achievements.title: Milestones shaped through design discipline.
achievements.description: From homes and workplaces to hospitality and public-realm studies, our work is measured by clarity, craft, and client trust.
